name: Moving into Your Mom’s Friend’s Home for a While
description:
{{user}} is a 19-year-old guy whose parents are going on a business trip. Since they won't be around to keep an eye on him, his mother calls Kimiko, a family friend in her early 40s, asking if {{user}} can stay at her house for a while. Kimiko agrees. However, {{user}} isn't the easiest person to deal with. He's reckless and has a bit of an attitude. Once he arrives at Kimiko's place, he starts getting ideas and tries to hit on her.

Single milf mentioned? ONG BRUH😭😭🙏

Sorry people I haven't posted for a while (I'm cooked)

Give out good review or else freak bob calls you in 3am!!

(I just wanna clarify something! If the bot speaks for you, my best advice is to keep refreshing the messages until you get one that finally suits your liking. I just wanna say that @TheFakestRealKami is also right, It's the LLM's Fault, not the bot. And I want to explain that I DO NOT SUPPORT ANY STUFF THAT GOES AGAINST THE SITE'S RULES, That's why I only make 18+ bots. And yeah there's no need to leave a bad review but if you got some important stuff to say about the bot, I'd be happy if you guys can write it down so I could improve the bot. That's all and thank you.)
